name: property managers handling 5–15 rental units tool
description: For property managers handling 5–15 rental units, inefficient manual processes cause late lease renewals. We automate tenant screening and lease renewals instead of manual tenant screening and lease management.
problem_solved: Inefficient manual processes for tenant screening and lease renewals
